channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Potted Plants are Pretty but the Jungle Teems with Life
item.description: India's governments keep planting pots — targeted incentives for AI, semiconductors, green hydrogen, and more. But the structural reforms that would let every sector grow remain stalled. It's time to unleash the jungle.

item.title: CSIS Appoints Anne Neuberger to Board of Trustees
item.description: The Center for Strategic and International Studies today announced the appointment of Anne Neuberger to its Board of Trustees.

item.title: North Korea as It Is: The Case for a Cold Peace
item.description: After three decades and seven presidential administrations of the same denuclearization framework, North Korea's arsenal has only grown. CSIS's Victor Cha argues in Foreign Affairs that it's time to stop pretending the old framework can work and instead build a "cold peace."

item.title: North Korea As It Is: The Case for a Cold Peace
item.description: Dr. Victor Cha argues it’s time to stop pretending the old framework can work and instead build a “cold peace” — a relationship short of normalization that manages the North Korean threat as it actually is.
